---
title: "Community Explorer"
subtitle: "Interactive Monastic Community Profile & ESG Scoring"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: report-style.css
    toc: false
---

//| echo: false

// ============================================
// 1. DATA LOADING
// ============================================

communities = FileAttachment("../data/processed/monastic_sites.csv").csv({typed: true})
orders = FileAttachment("../data/processed/orders_metadata.csv").csv({typed: true})
esg = FileAttachment("../data/processed/esg_metrics.csv").csv({typed: true})
network = FileAttachment("../data/processed/community_network.csv").csv({typed: true})
economic = FileAttachment("../data/processed/economic_indicators.csv").csv({typed: true})


// ============================================
// 2. COMMUNITY SELECTOR
// ============================================

viewof selectedCommunity = Inputs.select(
  communities.map(d => d.name),
  {
    label: "Select a Community",
    sort: true,
    unique: true
  }
)


// ============================================
// 3. FILTERED DATA
// ============================================

profile = communities.find(d => d.name === selectedCommunity)
communityESG = esg.find(d => d.name === selectedCommunity)
communityOrder = orders.find(d => d.order === profile.order)
communityEcon = economic.filter(d => d.name === selectedCommunity)
sisters = network.filter(d => d.source === selectedCommunity || d.target === selectedCommunity)


// ============================================
// 4. PROFILE CARD
// ============================================

html`
<div class="profile-card">
  <h2>${profile.name}</h2>
  <table>
    <tr><td><strong>Order</strong></td><td>${profile.order}</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Founded</strong></td><td>${profile.founded}</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Location</strong></td><td>${profile.location}</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Status</strong></td><td>${profile.status}</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Dissolution Cause</strong></td><td>${profile.dissolution_cause || "N/A"}</td></tr>
  </table>
</div>
`


// ============================================
// 5. ESG RADAR CHART
// ============================================

{
  const dimensions = ["environmental", "social", "governance"];
  const scores = dimensions.map(d => communityESG[d]);
  const band = communityESG.composite >= 75 ? "🟢 Dark Green"
             : communityESG.composite >= 55 ? "🟢 Green"
             : communityESG.composite >= 35 ? "🟡 Amber"
             : "🔴 Red";

  return html`
    <div class="esg-panel">
      <h3>ESG Score: ${communityESG.composite}/100 — ${band}</h3>
    </div>
  `;
}

Plot.plot({
  projection: "identity",
  marks: [
    Plot.line(
      ["Environmental", "Social", "Governance", "Environmental"].map((d, i) => ({
        angle: (i / 3) * 2 * Math.PI,
        r: [communityESG.environmental, communityESG.social, communityESG.governance, communityESG.environmental][i]
      })),
      {
        x: d => d.r * Math.cos(d.angle),
        y: d => d.r * Math.sin(d.angle),
        stroke: "#33FFA2",
        strokeWidth: 2
      }
    )
  ],
  width: 300,
  height: 300
})


// ============================================
// 6. ORDER PROTOCOL CARD
// ============================================

html`
<div class="order-card">
  <h3>Order: ${communityOrder.order}</h3>
  <table>
    <tr><td><strong>Governance Model</strong></td><td>${communityOrder.governance}</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Economic Model</strong></td><td>${communityOrder.economic_model}</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Territorial Strategy</strong></td><td>${communityOrder.territorial_strategy}</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Founded</strong></td><td>${communityOrder.order_founded}</td></tr>
  </table>
</div>
`


// ============================================
// 7. SISTER COMMUNITIES
// ============================================

html`
<div class="sisters-panel">
  <h3>Sister Communities (${sisters.length})</h3>
  <table>
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th>Community</th>
        <th>Distance (km)</th>
        <th>Shared Period</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      ${sisters.map(d => html`
        <tr>
          <td>${d.source === selectedCommunity ? d.target : d.source}</td>
          <td>${d.distance_km}</td>
          <td>${d.shared_period}</td>
        </tr>
      `)}
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
`


// ============================================
// 8. ECONOMIC TIMELINE
// ============================================

Plot.plot({
  marks: [
    Plot.lineY(communityEcon, {
      x: "year",
      y: "revenue_index",
      stroke: "#FF33FF",
      strokeWidth: 2
    }),
    Plot.dot(communityEcon, {
      x: "year",
      y: "revenue_index",
      fill: "#33FFA2",
      r: 4
    })
  ],
  x: {label: "Year"},
  y: {label: "Revenue Index"},
  width: 600,
  height: 300,
  style: {
    background: "transparent",
    color: "#121212"
  }
})


// ============================================
// 9. HISTORICAL TIMELINE
// ============================================

html`
<div class="timeline-panel">
  <h3>Historical Timeline</h3>
  <ul>
    <li><strong>${profile.founded}</strong> — Foundation</li>
    <li><strong>${profile.peak_year || "N/A"}</strong> — Peak Influence</li>
    <li><strong>${profile.decline_year || "N/A"}</strong> — Decline</li>
    <li><strong>${profile.dissolution_year || "Active"}</strong> — ${profile.status === "Active" ? "Still Active" : "Dissolution"}</li>
  </ul>
  <p><strong>Architectural Legacy:</strong> ${profile.architectural_legacy || "No data"}</p>
  <p><strong>Cultural Legacy:</strong> ${profile.cultural_legacy || "No data"}</p>
</div>
`
